color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
User
Mac user with multiple
monitors and Spaces

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
SpacesSync.spoon
Lua module loaded by Hammerspoon.
Watches Space changes and
mirrors them across a sync group.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
~/.hammerspoon/init.lua
User config: syncGroups, hotkeys.
Calls hs.loadSpoon SpacesSync
and :start.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Hammerspoon
macOS automation runtime.
Provides hs.spaces, hs.screen,
hs.canvas, hs.timer, hs.settings.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
macOS Window Server
+ Mission Control
Authoritative source of
Spaces state. Driven via
private CGSSpace APIs.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
hs.settings store
org.hammerspoon.Hammerspoon.plist
persists workspace names
across restarts.
